untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Realized volatility percentile ranking against historical rolling window — no percentile ranking indicator available; (2) IV percentile for index — no implied volatility percentile indicator in allowed list; (3) Straddle/strangle construction and management — derivatives strategy not expressible in price-based indicator rules; (4) Profit target and stop loss as % of max profit (dynamic Greeks-based) — requires options pricing model not available in backtester. Translated entry conditions using hvol_20 (realized vol proxy) and india_vix (vol regime) as approximations, but full signal intent is untranslatable.
translation_notes: This is an options income strategy requiring implied volatility surfaces, Greeks calculations, and straddle P&L mechanics. Only the vol regime entry conditions could be approximated using hvol_20 and india_vix. Exit conditions assume mean reversion in volatility. The signal fundamentally requires an options pricing module and IV term structure data not available in the standard indicator set.
